questions.question: Which HTTP method should be used to partially update a resource (only send changed fields)?
A Spring Boot endpoint creates a user and should signal success. Which HTTP status code is most appropriate?
In REST, what does 'idempotent' mean for an HTTP method like DELETE?
options: The operation has no side effects on the server
The operation can be called multiple times and the result is the same as calling it once
The operation always returns the same response body
The operation does not require authentication

questions.question: What is the correct REST URL to get all orders belonging to user with id 5?
In Angular, what happens if you subscribe to an HttpClient observable but provide no error handler?
options: Angular automatically retries the request 3 times
The observable throws an unhandled error that crashes the application
The error is silently ignored — the observable completes without emitting
HttpClient shows a default browser alert with the error message
